title: Golden Ticket: Kerberos TGT with Anomalous Encryption or Lifetime
description: Detects Kerberos TGT requests (4768) with RC4 encryption (0x17) or from unusual sources. Golden tickets use RC4-encrypted TGTs with krbtgt hash. Also detects TGT renewal (4770) for krbtgt service with unexpected encryption.
query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' and (('Event ID' = '4768' and 'Original Log Content' like '%0x17%') or ('Event ID' = '4770' and 'Original Log Content' like '%ServiceName:krbtgt%' and 'Original Log Content' like '%0x17%')) | eval Account = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'TargetUserName:([^;@]+)'), SrcIP = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'IpAddress:([^;]+)') | stats count as Requests by Account, SrcIP, Entity, 'Event ID' | sort -Requests
